summary: Iteration 108 - Testing sync progress indicator and impersonation logs tab. Fixed API pagination and date display issues.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed impersonation-logs API to support page parameter and return total_pages
/app/frontend/src/pages/Settings.js - Fixed date display using created_at instead of timestamp
seed_data_creation: Existing impersonation logs used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Impersonation logs tab and sync progress indicator are working correctly. The OfflineBanner component shows sync progress with percentage and progress bar.

1_impersonation_logs_tab.description: تبويب سجلات المراقبة في صفحة الإعدادات
verified: Table displays with columns: المدير, دخل كـ, التاريخ والوقت
Date displaying correctly in Arabic format (٢٥ فبراير ٢٠٢٦، ٠٨:١٤ م)
bugs_fixed: API was using skip parameter but frontend sent page - Fixed API to support page parameter
API was not returning total_pages - Fixed to calculate and return total_pages
Date showing 'Invalid Date' - Fixed to use created_at instead of timestamp

verified: Returns logs array with correct structure
Returns total, total_pages, page, limit, skip
Blue background during sync with Loader2 spinner

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Frontend sent 'page' parameter but backend expected 'skip'. Also backend didn't return 'total_pages'
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated backend API to accept 'page' parameter and calculate skip. Added total_pages to response

bugs_fixed.issue: Date showing 'Invalid Date' in audit logs table
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Frontend used log.timestamp but API returns log.created_at

console_warnings: IndexedDB error: 'is_synced' index access issue - This is a known issue with offline storage that doesn't affect functionality
